contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Capoeira platform — Switch to local MP3 playback
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/3
  
  Details:
  Updated practice music playback from YouTube embeds to local MP3 files
  
  Changes:
  - Added audio_url fields to all tracks in music_library.json
  - Fixed malformed YouTube URLs (https:// → https://)
  - Removed duplicate track entry
  - Updated practice-flow.js to use HTML5 audio instead of YouTube iframes:
    * loadMove stops existing audio before loading next move
    * playMusicAndStart controls local audio element
    * togglePause handles audio pause/resume
    * stopTimer stops audio when timer ends
  
  Benefits:
  ✅ No YouTube ads during practice sessions
  ✅ Precise timing control for 45-minute sessions
  ✅ Offline capability (MP3 files work without internet)
  ✅ Better performance (no YouTube API dependencies)
  ✅ Simpler architecture (no iframe messaging)
  
  GitHub:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/3
  
  This enables seamless capoeira practice sessions with local berimbau-tempo music playback, improving user experience significantly.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
